across.clue: To become physically different from other plants or animals of the same type as a result of a genetic change.
To say that something such as a fact is not true or correct.
Intended to last or perform an activity only until someone or something permanent or final is available.
Reasonable and sensible; easy to follow.
To make something dirty, polluted, or poisonous by adding chemicals, waste, or infection.
Theoretical rather than practical or relevant to real life.
To think about or discuss something very carefully, especially before making a decision.
To protect someone against a disease by injecting a small amount of it so the body can fight it off.

down.clue: A slight idea or small piece of information that tells you that something might exist or be happening.
Someone who has a position after someone else.
Very valuable and impossible to replace.
The rate at which something moves in one direction.
